description_long: This is a metallic wristwatch with a robust, segmented link bracelet and a round case. The watch face is black with silver hour markers, including a prominent Roman numeral XII at the top, and a rectangular date window on the right side. The bezel is smooth and slightly raised, encasing the dial securely. The crown is positioned on the right side of the case, used for adjusting the time and date. The bracelet is composed of interlocking metal links, giving it a classic and durable appearance. The overall design is elegant and functional, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A silver metal wristwatch with a black dial, Roman numeral XII, and a segmented link bracelet. Features a date window and a smooth, round bezel.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the thickness of the case and the segmented metal bracelet in a circular form.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the black dial, Roman numeral XII, date window, and the full face of the watch.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile highlighting the crown and the curvature of the bracelet.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the width and structure of the metal bracelet links.
attribute_brand_logo: The brand logo 'CADISEN' is printed in white, centered below the XII marker on the dial.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is black with a minimalist design, featuring silver hour indices, a large Roman numeral XII at the top, and a rectangular date window at 3 o'clock. The hands are simple and silver, with a clean, uncluttered layout.
attribute_strap_type: Metal link bracelet made of stainless steel, composed of interlocking rectangular links.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three hands (hour, minute, second) and a date window at 3 o'clock. No subdials or luminous elements are visible.
